content_of_post_to_comment: 2 years ago I was diagnosed with ADHD and Autism 2 weeks ago I was diagnosed with Triple Negative Breast Cancer, stage III I haven't cried once, and I feel like that's an inappropriate response…I'm not sad, I'm not angry, I'm not scared…I don't know what to feel about it.
comment: It’s interesting how we treat emotion as something that must appear immediately, when sometimes the system is just allocating everything to processing and stability. In that frame, “nothing” isn’t absence so much as a different mode of response.
